info.name: GRC & Vendor Management Complete API Collection
info.description:
Complete API collection for GRC (Governance, Risk, and Compliance) and Vendor Management (Third Party Risk Management) systems.

Generated: 2025-12-09 14:06:55

This collection includes:
- ALL endpoints from GRC API URLs PDF (700+ endpoints)
- ALL endpoints from Vendor Management API URLs PDF (300+ endpoints)
- Real user credentials from grc2 database (2 users per role)
- Test data for all endpoints
- Automatic token management
- Comprehensive test scripts

User Credentials:
Each role has 2 user credentials available as collection variables.
Format: {role_name_user1_username} and {role_name_user1_password}

Example Usage:
- {grc_administrator_user1_username} = comp.anita.singh
- {grc_administrator_user1_password} = 1234
- {compliance_manager_user1_username} = comp.deepika.rao
- {compliance_manager_user1_password} = 1234

Updated: API endpoints migrated to /api/tprm/ prefix structure

query.description: User ID to filter rejected framework versions
Set to 'true' to bypass session framework filter and return all policies. Use 'false' or omit to apply session filter.
Optional: Filter by specific framework ID, or use 'all' to bypass filter

exec: console.error('ERROR: approval_id variable is not set. Please set it in your environment or collection variables.');
throw new Error('approval_id is required. Set it in environment variables.');
console.error('ERROR: base_url variable is not set.');
throw new Error('base_url is required. Set it in environment variables.');

throw new Error('access_token is required. Please login first.');

console.log('Successfully set request body with ExtractedData');
throw new Error('Failed to parse approval data: ' + e.message);

body.raw:
{
  "SubPolicy": 1,
  "ComplianceTitle": "Data Protection and Privacy Compliance",
  "ComplianceItemDescription": "This compliance requirement ensures that all personal data is processed in accordance with applicable data protection regulations, including GDPR, CCPA, and other regional privacy laws. It covers data collection, storage, processing, and deletion procedures.",
  "ComplianceType": "Regulatory",
  "Scope": "This compliance applies to all IT operations, data processing activities, customer data handling, and third-party data sharing within the organization across all business units.",
  "Objective": "To ensure compliance with data protection regulations, maintain customer trust, avoid regulatory penalties, and protect sensitive information from unauthorized access or disclosure.",
  "BusinessUnitsCovered": "IT Operations, Security, Data Management, Legal, HR, Marketing",
  "Criticality": "High",
  "MandatoryOptional": "Mandatory",
  "ManualAutomatic": "Manual",
  "reviewer": 1,
  "ApprovalDueDate": "2026-02-15",
  "ComplianceVersion": "1.0",
  "IsRisk": true,
  "PossibleDamage": "Regulatory fines up to 4% of annual revenue, reputational damage, loss of customer trust, legal liability, business disruption",
  "mitigation": {
    "1": "Implement data encryption at rest and in transit",
    "2": "Conduct regular data protection impact assessments",
    "3": "Maintain comprehensive data processing records",
    "4": "Establish data breach notification procedures"
  },
  "PotentialRiskScenarios": "Unauthorized data access, data breach, non-compliance with GDPR requirements, inadequate data retention policies",
  "RiskType": "Current",
  "RiskCategory": "Compliance",
  "RiskBusinessImpact": "High financial and reputational impact",
  "Impact": "8.5",
  "Probability": "6.5",
  "MaturityLevel": "Defined",
  "Applicability": "Applies to all EU and US operations, customer data, employee data, and third-party data processing"
}

{

  "versionType": "Minor",

  "Scope": "This compliance applies to all IT operations, data processing activities, customer data handling, third-party data sharing, and cloud services within the organization across all business units and geographic regions.",
  "Objective": "To ensure compliance with data protection regulations, maintain customer trust, avoid regulatory penalties, protect sensitive information, and implement enhanced data governance practices.",
  "BusinessUnitsCovered": "IT Operations, Security, Data Management, Legal, HR, Marketing, Cloud Services",
  "Criticality": "High",
  "MandatoryOptional": "Mandatory",
  "ManualAutomatic": "Manual",
  "IsRisk": true,
  "PossibleDamage": "Regulatory fines up to 4% of annual revenue, reputational damage, loss of customer trust, legal liability, business disruption, loss of business partnerships",
  "mitigation": {
    "1": "Implement data encryption at rest and in transit",
    "2": "Conduct regular data protection impact assessments",
    "3": "Maintain comprehensive data processing records",
    "4": "Establish data breach notification procedures",
    "5": "Implement automated data classification and tagging"
  },
  "PotentialRiskScenarios": "Unauthorized data access, data breach, non-compliance with GDPR requirements, inadequate data retention policies, third-party data sharing violations",
  "RiskType": "Current",
  "RiskCategory": "Compliance",
  "RiskBusinessImpact": "High financial and reputational impact with potential for business closure",
  "Impact": "8.5",

}
